Read if you want:

Hey guys :P I want to say thank you for almost 12k !! And sorry for my lack in activity. I started talking to this guy for about a week, and we ended up making out in his car only for him to completely ghost me the next day. I cut him off and have been spending a lot of time with my friends to recover, bc I’ll be so real, it really hurt me because I was genuinely starting to crush on him. But whatever, enough about my terrible love life, hope yall like the bot :>
